extraction.notes: Primary document is a Service Agreement between BBK Midtown Commons LLC (Owner) and Corporate Services Consultants, LLC (Vendor) for trash removal, term 2025-04-01 to 2026-03-31, terminable by either party with 30 days' written notice or upon 5-day-cure default. Compensation and detailed service scope are per 'Exhibit A' referenced in the agreement, but the actual Exhibit A attached is a separate 'Short Form Agency Agreement' dated 3/1/25 between BK Knightdale, LLC (Principal) and Corporate Services Consultants, LLC (Agent), under which Agent selects and manages a Waste Removal Contractor and collects fees from tenants, remitting 20% of Gross Charges to Principal quarterly (on 15th of every third month) - this Agency Agreement has a 1-year initial term from 3/1/25 auto-renewing for unlimited additional 1-year terms unless terminated with 30 days' notice, or automatically upon uncured breach. No specific pricing/fee schedule or dollar compensation amount is stated in either document (fees to tenants are set by Agent based on market rates), so annual_value could not be determined. Exhibit B contains insurance requirements only. Because the main Service Agreement's Section 3(a) term (auto-renew box unchecked) shows a fixed term with no automatic renewal, but the attached Exhibit A (Agency Agreement) does auto-renew annually - flagged for manager review to confirm true governing term/pricing mechanics given the conflicting exhibit.
extraction.pricing_summary: No fixed price stated; compensation is per Exhibit A structure where Agent (vendor) bills tenants for waste removal fees at/below market rate and remits 20% of Gross Charges to Owner/Principal quarterly.

extraction.pricing_summary: $2,525.00 per month per Exhibit B contract (6 nights/week sweeping/portering), payable within 30 days of invoice per main agreement (Exhibit B invoicing terms state payable by 10th of following month).
extraction.term_summary: Main Service Agreement term runs 2026-03-01 to 2027-02-28. Either party may terminate for any reason with 10 days prior written notice, or for default with 5 days notice/cure. Attached Exhibit B vendor proposal (undated, referencing a separate 1-year term with automatic year-to-year renewal and 30-day termination notice) governs scope/pricing but conflicts on term are controlled by the main Agreement's 10-day termination and fixed 3/1/2026-2/28/2027 term.
